content: Couldn't clear w4a5 (my wheels/covs/keeper lvl kinda low), but it's enough for an easy w4a4 while letting me transfer my better wheels to another team. Enough for my first f2p 400 clear <:24_smile:1459073862544130131> (been playing for 3-4 months):

Most of the blue realm units are good.
Red also has okish ones but the real hunt there is for the old limiteds.
Yellow has also good units.
Purple has also okish units but also has some of the most cracked ones if you ever get up to +12 on some of them (you will with time)
